message:
fix(frankenterm-color-types): gate 44 std-dependent tests for no_std compilation (wa-2p87e)

Add #[cfg(feature = "std")] to 44 tests that call methods gated behind
the std feature (contrast_ratio, to_hsla, lighten, delta_e, etc.) or
depend on std-only functionality (csscolorparser, table-based sRGB
conversion). Fixes all 68 compilation errors when building without std.

Without std: 88 tests pass. With std: 132 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
